name: PNANA
desc: PNANA is a modern terminal text editor built with FTXUI, inspired by Nano, Micro, and Sublime Text. It offers an intuitive UI, familiar shortcuts, and robust e…
descFull: PNANA is a modern terminal text editor built with FTXUI, inspired by Nano, Micro, and Sublime Text. It offers an intuitive UI, familiar shortcuts, and robust editing capabilities.
